rationale: Section 25.135 governs how qualifying trust interests in a homestead are listed for appraisal records. It references §11.13(j) for the qualifying-trust definition, not the §11.13(b) dollar exemption amount. Raising the dollar threshold creates no conflict.
quote: The interest of a qualifying trust as defined by Section 11.13(j) in a residence homestead shall be listed in the name of the trustor of the trust.
